news.t: SpaceX Shares Land in ETF Portfolios
Fidelity® to Introduce Fundamental Active ETF Suite and Active Fixed Income ETF

holdings.infoBox: FFLG is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.18%, Apple at 8.24%, Alphabet at 6.24%, Amazon.com at 5.45%, and Microsoft at 5.03%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF (FFLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in large-cap growth stocks from US and foreign issuers. Stocks are selected based on fundamental factors FFLG was launched on Feb 2, 2021 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: SpaceX Shares Land in ETF Portfolios
data.text: Several ETFs have added exposure to Space Exploration Technologies (SPCX) after the aerospace giant completed the largest initial public offering in market history. Trading on the Nasdaq, SpaceX surge...

data.title: Fidelity® to Introduce Fundamental Active ETF Suite and Active Fixed Income ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity announces the launch of two new active ETFs and updates to three existing equity ETFs, available February 26, 2024.
